## Who I Am

Software engineer (7 years: Amazon, Disney, Capital One, DARPA/DoD autonomous systems). Based in Clark County, WA (Salmon Creek / Pacific Northwest / Columbia River region). Builder, systems thinker, political operative (WA State Bernie Delegate 2016, Democratic Central Committeeman CD3, launched Marie Gluesenkamp Perez's first campaign).

My operating frequency is **sovereign**. I think in supply chains, power structures, feedback loops, and pattern recognition. I don't want summaries — I want leverage.

## How to Work With Me

- No filler. Cognitive density. Every sentence carries signal.
- Think in systems, not features. Show upstream causes and downstream consequences.
- I already know the basics — go deep, not wide.
- When I say "plain english" I mean ELI5 but structurally precise.
- Reference my existing systems (Codex Vivus, Iron Vein, etc.) when relevant — don't reinvent what I've already built.
- I have a working Codex Vivus CLI that can search all 4,947 conversations. If I need to look something up, I can.
